description: Executes a DAX query against a Power BI Semantic Model and returns the result as a DuckDB table.
comment: Supports named authentication parameters and DuckDB azure secret auth via secret_name or Secret= in the connection string.

description: Returns semantic model table metadata via INFO.VIEW.TABLES().
comment: Uses the same named parameters as dax_query (auth_mode, access_token, secret_name, tenant_id, client_id, client_secret, effective_user_name, timeout_ms).

description: Returns semantic model column metadata via INFO.VIEW.COLUMNS().
comment: Uses the same named parameters as dax_query (auth_mode, access_token, secret_name, tenant_id, client_id, client_secret, effective_user_name, timeout_ms).

description: Returns semantic model measure metadata via INFO.VIEW.MEASURES().
comment: Uses the same named parameters as dax_query (auth_mode, access_token, secret_name, tenant_id, client_id, client_secret, effective_user_name, timeout_ms).

description: Returns semantic model relationship metadata via INFO.VIEW.RELATIONSHIPS().
comment: Uses the same named parameters as dax_query (auth_mode, access_token, secret_name, tenant_id, client_id, client_secret, effective_user_name, timeout_ms).
